name: Coral Talk
tagline: Online comments are broken. Our open-source commenting platform, Coral, rethinks how moderation, comment display, and conversation function, creating the oppo
description:
Online comments are broken. Our open-source commenting platform, Coral, rethinks how moderation, comment display, and conversation function, creating the oppo


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  coral-mongo:
    image: mongo:4.2
    volumes:
      - coral-mongo:/data/db
    restart: unless-stopped
  coral-redis:
    image: redis:3.2
    volumes:
      - coral-redis:/data
    restart: unless-stopped
  coral-talk:
    depends_on:
      - coral-mongo
      - coral-redis
    image: coralproject/talk:6
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGODB_URI: mongodb://coral-mongo:27017/coral
      REDIS_URI: redis://coral-redis:6379
      SIGNING_SECRET: 4a7b79a920f837d936e6e7c3fc612f33
    ports:
      - 42018:5000
volumes:
  coral-mongo: null
  coral-redis: null
